note: Both columns exclude shared_dict bytes for fair per-file compression comparison. Dict cost amortized separately.

observation_dedup: Cross-repo dict de-duplicates entries: 334 sum → 256 unique (-23.4%). Bytes: 13716 sum → 10481 unique (-23.6%). Indicates ~23% pattern overlap across repos (mostly small-schema headers + JSON structural patterns).
observation_overfit_threshold: Per-repo: dict <= 1.17% of corpus input bytes across all 6 repos (max n6-arch); 6-repo cumulative dict 0.34% of total input — well below over-fitting risk threshold (typically >5%).
super_linear_check: sum_per_repo_dict (13716B) > cross_repo_dict (10481B) — dict growth is SUB-LINEAR with repo count due to cross-repo pattern overlap. Refutes F-A19-3 super-linear scaling concern at 6-repo scale.

observation: Schema-id "s1" carries different field schemas in 5/6 repos at per-repo dict layer:

examples: repo input_path input_bytes output_bytes saving_pct chain
phase file_count a12_fired_count total_input_bytes total_output_bytes byte_weighted_saving_pct
file input_bytes output_bytes saving_pct chain phase
track round run_ts filter_gate filter_round total pass fail skip manifest_count stub_count gate_breakdown individual_results overall_decision decision_reason
ts schema kind initialized_by fields note

cross_repo_amplification_potential: Without PASS 0 schema-id-norm (a89f3328 fix in flight, commit 38f4c2e6 hexa-lang), cross-repo merge would alias 9 distinct field schemas under s1 → max 8/9 = 88.9% spurious-alias rate. PASS 0 normalization to fingerprint-derived ids (S<8hex>) eliminates collision by replacing raw s<N> with djb2(sorted-fields) before pattern aggregation.
measured_cross_repo_dict: cross-repo dict has 256 entries. Without PASS 0, expected wasteful schema slots ~= sum(distinct s<N> per repo). PASS 0 + 0.5 (commits 38f4c2e6 + d6a524ca) deduplicate to canonical S<hex> ids; current run uses v1 path (pre-PASS-0.5) — encode-side rewrite NOT yet active in hxc_migrate corpus-mode wrapper.
verdict: F-A19-1 collision demonstrated empirically at per-repo dict construction. Cross-repo amplification PARTIALLY mitigated by PASS 0 (already in module 38f4c2e6); full mitigation requires hxc_migrate wrapper to call A19 v2 (encode-v2/decode-v2) — currently calls v1 path. F-A19-1 status: NARROWED via PASS 0+0.5; final RETIRE pending hxc_migrate v2-wire integration.

falsifiers.name: cross_repo_dict_pollution_exceeds_per_repo_benefit
falsifiers.statement: cross-repo aggregate saving% < per-repo isolated SUM saving% by >0.1pp → cross-repo dict accumulation is NET-NEGATIVE at scale; per-repo isolation should be the production default
falsifiers.preregister_basis: cross-repo dict shares fewer high-value patterns than each repo holds privately; cross-repo dict overhead (10,481B) outweighs cross-repo pattern reuse savings
falsifiers.remediation_path: PASS 0.5 encode-side id-rewrite (commit d6a524ca) projected to flip sign on adversarial-schema corpora (+43.32pp on synthetic adversarial vs -0.03pp current); production wiring of hxc_migrate corpus-mode → A19 v2 encode-v2/decode-v2 required.

falsifiers.name: dict_size_growth_super_linear_with_repo_count
falsifiers.statement: cross-repo cumulative dict bytes > sum(per-repo dict bytes) → dict growth is super-linear in repo count; cross-repo accumulation has no scale benefit
falsifiers.preregister_basis: naive concatenation hypothesis: each repo contributes ~independent patterns; cross-repo dict ~= sum(per-repo dict) + cross-repo overlap savings (assumption: small overlap)

measured_2026_04_28.observation: cross-repo dict 10,481B < sum per-repo 13,716B (76.4%); dict growth is SUB-LINEAR via cross-repo pattern overlap deduplication. F-A19-3 NOT TRIPPED at 6-repo scale.

falsifiers.remediation_path: monitor at higher repo counts (12+); current behavior healthy at 6-repo scale.

falsifiers.name: per_repo_anima_regression_in_cross_repo
falsifiers.statement: cross-repo encode of anima corpus yields lower per-file saving than per-repo isolated encode by >2pp → cross-repo accumulation actively hurts a specific repo
falsifiers.preregister_basis: anima corpus (40 files / 195KB / format_witness ledger) has homogeneous schema pattern; cross-repo dict pollutes anima encode by displacing high-value anima-internal patterns with low-value cross-repo patterns

measured_2026_04_28.verdict: TRIPPED — anima per-file regression -4.44pp under cross-repo dict; nexus -0.08, n6 -0.40, hexa-lang ~0, airgenome ~0, hive -0.11. Anima is the dominant cross-repo regression driver.

falsifiers.remediation_path: A19 corpus-mode deploy gate: prefer per-repo-isolated for repos with homogeneous schema (anima format_witness class); cross-repo only for heterogeneous-but-overlapping repos (hive design_strategy_trawl class). Corpus-class-aware deployment policy from raw 137 path-matrix entry de9281a4f.
